using System;

namespace Demo
{
    public static class Adder_DuckTypingExtensions_445b611e897affbf5c96c0b5e40d7e27
    {
        extension (global::Demo.Adder target)
        {
            public T Duck<T>() where T : class
            {
                if (typeof(T) == typeof(global::Demo.ICalc))
                {
                    return (T)(object)new global::Demo.Adder_ICalc_Proxy_f3ffae2df1089414237f23f8c3088d6b((global::Demo.Adder)target);
                }
                throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException("NTypeForge: no proxy was generated for " + typeof(T));
            }
        }
    }
}

// <auto-generated/>
using System;
using NTypeForge;

namespace Demo
{
    internal sealed class Adder_ICalc_Proxy_f3ffae2df1089414237f23f8c3088d6b : global::Demo.ICalc, IProxy<global::Demo.Adder>
    {
        private global::Demo.Adder __ntf_instance;

        public Adder_ICalc_Proxy_f3ffae2df1089414237f23f8c3088d6b(global::Demo.Adder instance)
        {
            __ntf_instance = instance;
        }

        global::Demo.Adder IProxy<global::Demo.Adder>.Inner => __ntf_instance;
        object IProxy.Unwrapped => __ntf_instance;

        public int Add(int a, int b)
        {
            return __ntf_instance.Add(a, b);
